cognition_3 Clinical data Cognitive function Childhood cognition cogchild 1207 Childhood cognition (standardised) score: derived from ages 8, 11 and 15 years {-9.0} Unknown Not applicable Various Not applicable 1961 Yes No These are derived variables for childhood cognition. Variables are standardised and are variables recommended for use.
cognition_2 Clinical data Cognitive function Childhood cognition cog8h 1208 COG score (standardised to whole population on each test) - at age 8 years {-9.0} Unknown Not applicable NF2 - Mental ability and scholastic attainment Not applicable 1954 Yes No These are derived variables for childhood cognition. Variables are standardised and are variables recommended for use.

Variables are standardised and are variables recommended for use.

Variables are standardised and are variables recommended for use.
